pages: Summary of November 2025 progress payments for Project AC-2025-041. All amounts in USD.
Entry dated 2025-11-18: Payment milestone marked as final was posted out of sequence; final payment executed before acceptance certificate issued for Lot A.
Note 2025-11-12: The third progress disbursement was processed before acceptance certificate for Phase 2; accounting flagged it as out of sequence.
Internal remark: Review sequencing controls in AP module to prevent premature releases.
Subject: Approval memo regarding settlement timing and compliance checks.
Observation: We observed final settlement triggered prior to acceptance certificate. Finance executed the remittance out of sequence due to year-end cutoff pressures.
Action Items: Reinforce gate checks; require acceptance certificate upload before releasing final settlement.
Batch 4821 transfer list for vendors: status overview and routing confirmations.
Transfer 4821-07 was marked "final" and released on 2025-11-15 before acceptance certificate for Tower C; this payment is out of sequence and requires exception approval.
QA review note: reconcile batch approvals with acceptance documents.
Email chain discussing invoice submission timelines and remittance dates.
Vendor request: "Please arrange the final payment prior to acceptance certificate." AP reply: "The remittance was processed out of sequence due to a system override for period close."
Follow-up: Vendor acknowledges receipt; compliance escalation noted.
Main agreement terms and definitions; scope of work and milestones.
Condition precedent: Final payment contingent on issuance of acceptance certificate and rectification of punch-list items.
Evaluation summary of vendor bids; scoring methodology and weightings.
Recommendation: Award to lowest compliant bidder; no exceptions raised on procurement process.
Index mapping acceptance checklist items to payment milestones for Packages A–F.
Finding E-3: The final payment for Package E on 2025-10-30 occurred before acceptance certificate; categorized as out of sequence in variance log.
Cross-reference table: acceptance IDs, payment vouchers, and exception approvals.
